title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
